zh.Otterden, Kent, England: 英國英格蘭肯特奧特爾登
zh.All Saints' Church, Ulcombe, Kent, Engla: 英國肯特武爾可姆哥吉拉 沙也 邱奇
zh.lifeSummary: 當Arnold St Leger於1374年出生時，他的父親Arnold St Leger22歲，母親Joanna Cherleton23歲。他於大約1399年與Joane de Luxembourg在英國肯特武爾可姆哥吉拉 沙也 邱奇結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1431年在英國肯特武爾可姆享年57歲，埋葬在英國肯特武爾可姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Arnold St Leger于1374年出生时，他的父亲Arnold St Leger22岁，母亲Joanna Cherleton23岁。他于大约1399年与Joane de Luxembourg在英国肯特武爾可姆哥吉拉 沙也 邱奇结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1431年在英国肯特武爾可姆享年57岁，埋葬在英国肯特武爾可姆。

nameMeanings.name: St
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: 1  French: habitational name from any of the places so called, for example in Normandy, named from a religious dedication to a (male) St. Clair.
2  North American variant spelling of   St  .   Claire  .

variants.name: Claire
meanings: Irish: variant of   Clare  .
Variant of   Clair  , an altered form of German   Klare  .
French: variant of   Clair  .

nameMeanings.name: Leger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Camille, Lucien, Pierre, Yvon, Antoine, Aurele, Emile, Jacques, Marcel, Zoel, Adelard.

French (Léger) and English: from the ancient Germanic personal name Leudgari, composed of the elements leud ‘people’ and gari (from garwa) ‘ready, eager’ or gari ‘spear’ and Latinized as Leodegar(ius). The name was borne by a 7th-century Christian saint, bishop of Autun, whose fame contributed to the popularity of the name in France. See also Ledger and St. Leger .
French (Léger): nickname from léger ‘light, superficial’.

variants.name: Lege
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alphie, Emile, Gaston, Henri, Leonce, Minus, Numa, Pierre, Rodolph.
German: topographic name meaning ‘swamp’.
Altered form of French Léger (see Leger ).

variants.name: Legere
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Armand, Normand, Aurele, Jacques, Adelard, Alban, Antoine, Desire, Eloi, Monique, Yvon.
French (Légère): nickname from légère, a feminine form of Léger ‘light, superficial’ (see Leger 2).
Altered form of French   Leger   1 or 2.

variants.name: Lougee
meanings: Channel Islands: altered form of Laugee, a variant of French Lauger, itself either a variant of Léger (see Leger ) or a variant, with fused definite article l', of Auger .

History: The first recorded American bearer of this surname was John Lougee from the isle of Jersey. Born Jean Laugee and by trade a knitter, he was aged c. 18 or 19 when he emigrated to the USA in the late 1600s, settling in Exeter, NH, where he became known as John Lougee, marrying Anne, the daughter of Colonel Moses Gilman.

variants.name: Ledger
meanings: English: from a Norman personal name, Leodegar, Old French Legier, of ancient Germanic origin (see Leger 1).
English: metonymic occupational name from Middle English legger ‘one who lays stone, a mason’, a derivative of Old English lecgan ‘to lay’.
Americanized form of French   Leger   1.

variants.name: St. Leger
meanings: French (Saint-Léger): habitational name from any of several places in various parts of France named Saint-Léger (from the dedication of their churches to Saint Leodegar, in French St. Léger, the martyred 7th-century bishop of Autun), or a nickname with the prefix Saint as an (ironic) attachment to the personal name or surname Léger (see Leger 1).

Haitian (also Saint-Léger): from Saint-Léger, a nickname, ornamental name, or personal name composed of the French prefix Saint and the personal name Léger (see Leger 1), or perhaps a habitational name from a place in Haiti called Saint-Léger (compare 1 above).
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Saint-Léger in La Manche or Saint-Léger-aux-Bois in Seine-Maritime, France (see 1 above).

nameMeanings.name: Arnold
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: 1  Jewish: Yiddish contracted form of   Aaron .
2  English: short form of   Arnold .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Arnold St Leger was born in 1374, his father, Arnold St Leger, was 22 and his mother, Joanna Cherleton, was 23. He married Joane de Luxembourg about 1399, in All Saints' Church, Ulcombe, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1431, in Ulcombe, Kent, England, at the age of 57, and was buried in Ulcombe, Kent, England.

fr.All Saints' Church, Ulcombe, Kent, Engla: All Saints' Church, Ulcombe, Kent, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Arnold St Leger est né en 1374, son père, Arnold St Leger, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Joanna Cherleton, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Joane de Luxembourg environ 1399, à All Saints' Church, Ulcombe, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1431, à Ulcombe, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à Ulcombe, Kent, Angleterre.

de.All Saints' Church, Ulcombe, Kent, Engla: All Saints' Church, Ulcombe, Kent, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Arnold St Leger 1374 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Arnold St Leger 22 und seine Mutter Joanna Cherleton 23. Er hat um 1399 in All Saints' Church, Ulcombe, Kent, England Joane de Luxembourg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1431 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Ulcombe, Kent, England und wurde in Ulcombe, Kent, England begraben.

Lui sposato Joane de Luxembourg circa 1399, nel All Saints' Church, Ulcombe, Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1431, nel Ulcombe, Kent, England, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolto a Ulcombe, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Arnold St Legerが1374年に生まれた時，父Arnold St Legerは22歳，母Joanna Cherletonは23歳であった。約1399年にイギリスケントウルコンベアル サイントス' チャーチでJoane de Luxembourgと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1431年にイギリスケントウルコンベで57歳で死去し，イギリスケントウルコンベにて埋葬された。

ko.All Saints' Church, Ulcombe, Kent, Engla: 영국 켄트 울코브 앨 세인츠' c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Arnold St Leger(이)가 1374년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Arnold St Leger(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Joanna Cherleton(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1399년 영국 켄트 울코브 앨 세인츠' c후르치에서 Joane de Luxembourg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1431년 영국 켄트 울코브에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 울코브에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Arnold St Leger nasceu em 1374, seu pai, Arnold St Leger, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Joanna Cherleton, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Joane de Luxembourg aproximadamente 1399, em All Saints' Church, Ulcombe, Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1431, em Ulcombe, Kent, Inglaterra, com 57 anos, e foi sepultado em Ulcombe, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.All Saints' Church, Ulcombe, Kent, Engla: алл сеинц' чурч, улкомб, кэнт, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Arnold St Leger родился в 1374 г., его отцу по имени Arnold St Leger было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Joanna Cherleton, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Joane de Luxembourg около 1399 г. в местности алл сеинц' чурч, улкомб, кэнт, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1431 г. в местности улкомб, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности улкомб, кэнт, Англия.
